title: santifer/career-ops
summary: An AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code featuring 14 specialized skill modes, a Go-based dashboard, PDF resume generation, and batch processing capabilities. Demonstrates practical application of AI agents to automate an end-to-end real-world workflow. 53.2k stars, gained 4,319 stars this week.
chinese_summary: 基于 Claude Code 构建的 AI 求职系统，包含 14 种专业技能模式、Go 语言仪表盘、PDF 简历生成和批量处理功能。展示了如何将 AI Agent 应用于端到端的真实工作流自动化。5.32 万星，本周新增 4319 星。
